uiHelpText: How long command execution should wait for shell integration before timing out.
description: Timeout (seconds) to wait for shell integration before command execution

uiHelpText: Upper bound for the number of tokens requested for each assistant response.
description: Maximum tokens requested per chat completion (1-128000)

uiHelpText: Controls randomness. Lower values are more deterministic; higher values allow more variation.
Limits token sampling to the most likely cumulative probability mass.
description: Nucleus sampling parameter for chat generation (0-1)

uiHelpText: How many additional MCP fetch calls the agent may make automatically after a truncated fetch result. Set to 0 to disable auto-pagination.
description: Maximum number of automatic follow-up MCP fetch calls after a truncated fetch result. Set to 0 to disable auto-pagination.

uiHelpText: Maximum combined fetch content the agent will keep while auto-continuing truncated MCP fetch results.
description: Maximum total characters accumulated while automatically continuing truncated MCP fetch results.
